summary: Iteration 92: Complete testing of Quality Hub Dashboard (/quality-hub), Smart Assign APIs, and babel-metadata-plugin fix. Backend: 26/26 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical pages load without babel errors, Quality Hub UI verified with correct data.
critical_code_review_comments: Quality Hub page correctly aggregates data from 4 collections (welders, instruments, non_conformities, audits, company_docs)
Smart Assign welders API properly computes overall_status based on qualification expiry dates
Smart Assign instruments API correctly filters out 'fuori_uso' instruments and computes calibration_status
Babel-metadata-plugin fix at line 936 adds null-safe check preventing 'Cannot read properties of null' errors
All KPI cards on Quality Hub are clickable and navigate to correct module pages
FascicoloTecnicoSection correctly integrates Smart Assign APIs for importing welders and instruments
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing (quality-hub-page, hub-kpi-grid, alert-banner, section-patents, section-instruments, section-ncs, next-audit-card)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Quality Hub, Saldatori, Strumenti, Audit, Sistema Qualita pages all load correctly)

seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data: 3 welders (1 expired patent, 1 expiring), 5 instruments (1 expired calibration, 1 expiring), 4 NCs (3 open - 1 alta priority), 2 audits (next: 2026-06-15).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quality Hub at /quality-hub aggregates alerts from welders, instruments, NCs, audits. Key data-testids: quality-hub-page, hub-kpi-grid, hub-kpi-saldatori, hub-kpi-apparecchiature, hub-kpi-nc-aperte, hub-kpi-audit-anno, hub-kpi-documenti, alert-banner, ok-banner, section-patents, section-instruments, section-ncs, next-audit-card. Smart Assign APIs at /api/smart-assign/welders and /api/smart-assign/instruments return lookup data with status indicators. Babel fix ensures all lucide-react importing pages compile correctly.

features_verified.backend_quality_hub_summary: PASS - GET /api/quality-hub/summary returns aggregated data from all 4 quality modules
features_verified.backend_quality_hub_summary_structure: PASS - Response has summary, next_audit, alerts keys
features_verified.backend_quality_hub_summary_fields: PASS - All count fields present (total_alerts, welders_total, patents_expired, etc.)
features_verified.backend_quality_hub_alerts_structure: PASS - Alerts has expired_patents, expiring_patents, expired_instruments, expiring_instruments, open_ncs
features_verified.backend_quality_hub_patent_alerts: PASS - Patent alerts have welder_name, stamp_id, standard, process, expiry_date, type
features_verified.backend_quality_hub_instrument_alerts: PASS - Instrument alerts have name, serial_number, instrument_type, next_calibration_date, type
features_verified.backend_quality_hub_nc_alerts: PASS - NC alerts have nc_id, nc_number, description, priority, status, date, source, days_open
features_verified.backend_quality_hub_next_audit: PASS - Next audit has date, audit_type, auditor_name
features_verified.backend_quality_hub_counts_match: PASS - Summary counts match alert list lengths
features_verified.backend_smart_assign_welders_structure: PASS - Welder has welder_id, name, stamp_id, role, overall_status, qualifications
features_verified.backend_smart_assign_welders_status: PASS - overall_status values: ok, warning, expired, no_qual
features_verified.backend_smart_assign_qualifications: PASS - Qualifications have qual_id, standard, process, expiry_date, status, has_file
features_verified.backend_smart_assign_qual_status: PASS - Qualification status values: attivo, in_scadenza, scaduto
features_verified.backend_smart_assign_instruments_structu: PASS - Instrument has instrument_id, name, serial_number, instrument_type, next_calibration_date, calibration_status
features_verified.backend_smart_assign_instruments_status: PASS - calibration_status values: ok, in_scadenza, scaduto
features_verified.frontend_quality_hub_kpi_grid: PASS - KPI grid visible with 5 cards
features_verified.frontend_quality_hub_alert_banner: PASS - Alert banner shows '7 elementi richiedono attenzione'
features_verified.frontend_quality_hub_patent_section: PASS - Patent alerts section visible with expired/expiring welders
features_verified.frontend_quality_hub_instruments_section: PASS - Instruments section visible with calibration alerts
features_verified.frontend_quality_hub_ncs_section: PASS - NCs section visible with 3 open NCs
features_verified.frontend_quality_hub_next_audit: PASS - Next audit card visible (15 giu 2026)
features_verified.frontend_quality_hub_sidebar_link: PASS - Quality Hub link visible in Certificazioni group
features_verified.frontend_kpi_navigation_saldatori: PASS - Clicking Saldatori KPI navigates to /saldatori
features_verified.frontend_kpi_navigation_nc: PASS - Clicking NC Aperte KPI navigates to /audit
features_verified.frontend_sidebar_all_quality_links: PASS - All 5 quality module links visible (Quality Hub, Sistema Qualita, Apparecchiature, Saldatori, Audit & NC)
features_verified.frontend_babel_fix_saldatori: PASS - /saldatori page loads without babel errors
features_verified.frontend_babel_fix_strumenti: PASS - /strumenti page loads without babel errors
features_verified.frontend_babel_fix_audit: PASS - /audit page loads without babel errors
features_verified.frontend_babel_fix_sistema_qualita: PASS - /sistema-qualita page loads without babel errors

test_classes: TestQualityHubSummary (10 tests) - summary structure, fields, alerts, auth
TestSmartAssignWelders (7 tests) - welders response, structure, status values, auth
TestSmartAssignInstruments (6 tests) - instruments response, structure, status values, auth
TestDataVerification (3 tests) - seed data verification for welders, instruments, NCs
